title: cli.py: click group and output helpers
description: Create `pypptx/cli.py` with the root `cli` click group (with `--version` option reading from `pypptx.__version__`) and shared output infrastructure: an `output_result(data: dict, plain: bool, plain_fn: Callable[[dict], str])` helper that writes JSON to stdout by default or calls `plain_fn` when `--plain` is active. Establish the `slide` subgroup. No commands wired yet.
acceptance_criteria: `pypptx --help` prints top-level usage listing available subcommands.
`output_result()` calls `plain_fn(data)` and writes its return value to stdout when `plain=True`.
`slide` click group is defined and `pypptx slide --help` works.
No command-line commands beyond `--version` and `--help` are wired in this bead.
